rgb-on-liquid.title: RGB Meets Simplicity: Programmable Seals on Liquid
rgb-on-liquid.description: We anchored RGB assets on Liquid, swapped across Bitcoin and Liquid with no custodian, and made the chain enforce RGB anchoring with a Simplicity covenant

june-2026-release-notes.title: June 2026: AI Agent, New Swaps Engine & Nostr Relay
june-2026-release-notes.description: We built KaleidoMind, an on-device AI agent, and previewed it on desktop and a mobile alpha. We started rebuilding the swap engine in Rust. The node got more capable, and we launched our own Nostr relay.

nostr-relay-launch.title: KaleidoSwap Now Runs Its Own Nostr Relay
nostr-relay-launch.description: KaleidoSwap launched wss://relay.kaleidoswap.com, an open Nostr relay that powers wallet identity, app connections, and order discovery.

rgb-protocol.title: RGB Protocol on Bitcoin: History, Architecture, and How KaleidoSwap Fits in The Ecosystem
rgb-protocol.description: The history, architecture, and ecosystem of RGB Protocol on Bitcoin v0.11.1 — and what KaleidoSwap is building on top of it.

may-2026-release-notes.title: May 2026: Extension Mainnet Beta, Covenant DEX Rails, and Partner Admin Panel
may-2026-release-notes.description: The browser extension shipped its first mainnet beta, our covenant DEX work took shape across three settlement rails, Liquid integration began, and the RGB Lightning Node reached v0.7.0.

bitcoin-agentic-payments.title: KaleidoAgent: An Autonomous AI Agent for Bitcoin L2
bitcoin-agentic-payments.description: KaleidoAgent is an autonomous AI agent for Bitcoin L2, executing trustless atomic swaps via MCP servers. 1st place at the WDK Hackathon.

april-2026-release-notes.title: April 2026: Desktop v0.4.0, SDK Fixes & CLI Improvements
april-2026-release-notes.description: April was a dense month of shipping. The Desktop App reached v0.4.0 with trading automation features. The SDK went through six patch releases. KaleidoCLI received a significant expansion of its command surface.

bitcoin-l2-interoperability.title: Solving Bitcoin's L2 Liquidity Problem: KaleidoSwap's Multi-Protocol DEX Layer
bitcoin-l2-interoperability.description: 2025 was the year of RGB. Now, as we head into 2026, KaleidoSwap is evolving from a single-protocol proof into a unified multi-protocol liquidity engine for the entire Bitcoin L2 ecosystem.

first-rgb-swap-mainnet.title: The First Ever RGB Asset Swap on Lightning Mainnet
first-rgb-swap-mainnet.description: KaleidoSwap has executed the first atomic swap of an RGB asset over the Lightning Network on mainnet — a historic milestone for Bitcoin's Layer 2 ecosystem.

stablecoins-on-bitcoin.title: KaleidoSwap × UTEXO: Bringing RGB-native USDT Swaps to Lightning
stablecoins-on-bitcoin.description: KaleidoSwap integrates with UTEXO, the team behind the first RGB bridge, to bring fast, trustless BTC ⇄ USDT swaps with the privacy and self-custody guarantees of Bitcoin's infrastructure.

pre-seed-investment.title: KaleidoSwap Secures Pre-Seed Investment to Build the First RGB-Powered DEX
pre-seed-investment.description: KaleidoSwap has secured a pre-seed investment from Bitfinex Ventures and Fulgur Ventures to accelerate the development of the first RGB-based DEX on the Lightning Network.

introducing-rate.title: Introducing Rate: AI-Powered Self-Sovereign RGB Lightning Wallet
introducing-rate.description: Rate, our AI-powered RGB Lightning wallet, just won the Plan B Hackathon in Lugano. Here's the story of how we built a Bitcoin assistant that makes Lightning, RGB assets, and social payments accessible to everyone.

kaleidoswap-v020.title: KaleidoSwap v0.2.0 — RGB Is Now Live on Mainnet
kaleidoswap-v020.description: KaleidoSwap v0.2.0 lands as RGB v0.11.1 goes live on Bitcoin mainnet — bringing advanced asset swaps, improved UX, and stronger Lightning infrastructure integration.

rgb-taproot-atomic-swaps.title: RGB — TaprootAssets Lightning Atomic Swaps
rgb-taproot-atomic-swaps.description: A simple protocol for trustless cross-protocol swaps between RGB20 and Taproot Assets over the Lightning Network.
